## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run prettier:check` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Story added or updated in `src/stories/` (for component/icon changes)
- [ ] Export added to the relevant `index.ts`
- [ ] No breaking changes, or breaking changes are documented below
